name: opencode-tools
description: OpenCode plugin suite — edit, impact, verify, trace, rename, graph, changelog, search, lint, refactor

scripts.test: python test_hashline.py && python deeper_tests.py && python regression_tests.py && python stress_test.py && python test_impact.py && python test_verify.py && python test_trace.py && python test_graph.py && python test_changelog.py && python test_search.py && python test_lint.py && python test_refactor.py
scripts.test:quick: for %t in (hashline impact verify trace rename graph changelog search lint refactor) do python %t.py --version 2>nul || echo %t not found
